rulings.Case Title: DALE BICKFORD VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Friday, February 26, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Underground Construction Co., Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Underground Construction satisfied its burden of production by presenting factually devoid discovery responses on the issue of asbestos content. Plaintiff failed to create a triable issue. Mr. Ay¿s opinion regarding the asbestos content of the pipe lacks foundation. =(220/HEK)
